bytetrack.failure_reason: ByteTrack IoU matching fails at 15-22px: 6-frame gap causes person displacement > bbox size, IoU drops to 0, tracks fragment into single-frame IDs.

key_finding: ByteTrack fails catastrophically on 15-22px persons with 6-frame sampling gap. The IoU between consecutive detections of the same person drops to ~0 because the person moves 5-10px between frames but the bbox is only 15-22px. This demonstrates why production SAR systems need either: (1) higher frame rate, (2) centroid-based trackers instead of IoU-based, or (3) Kalman prediction with appearance features.
